note: sealed HONEST BOUNDARY: sub-bit uniform AND treated both collapsed on a real forward. No sub-bit rate met mean symmetric KL <= 0.10 and argmax agreement >= 0.95. Salvage = organ inversion (mlp1 gate+up sensitive, mlp2 down tolerant). Axes left null are UNMEASURED and are not estimated. qwen3-235b:F1 row lands when that parent completes.
transfer_success_next_parent: organ inversion transferred to qwen3-235b:F1 (dominant_failure_organ = gate)
